name: Silero Models
blurb: Compact one-file models for STT, TTS, and the ubiquitous Silero VAD.
about: Silero ships compact, production-minded speech models that load in one line of PyTorch — STT for a handful of languages, plus the Silero VAD (voice activity detector) that has become a de-facto standard component in almost every open transcription pipeline.
STT models are CC-BY-NC-SA (commercial licences are sold separately); the VAD itself is MIT and safe to use anywhere.
install:
pip install torch torchaudio omegaconf

python -c "
import torch
model, decoder, utils = torch.hub.load(
  'snakers4/silero-models', 'silero_stt', language='en')"
